title: Fix Stage 4 Analyze: Merge FlopsPass+TrainFlopsPass, RooflinePass dedup, delete dead modules

stories.title: Issue A: RooflinePass reads FlopsPass annotations instead of recomputing _fmr()
acceptanceCriteria: RooflinePass.run() reads node.annotations['flops'], ['read_bytes'], ['write_bytes'] before calling sim._fmr()
Falls back to sim._fmr(node) only when flops==0 and read_bytes==0 (FlopsPass didn't run)
All existing tests still pass after the change
No behavioral change when FlopsPass runs before RooflinePass (the normal pipeline order)

stories.title: Issue B: Merge TrainFlopsPass into FlopsPass (user-requested fusion)
acceptanceCriteria: FlopsPass.run() checks ctx.training — when set, adds flops_fwd/flops_dx/flops_dw annotations
flops key always contains raw forward FLOPs (never overwritten for RooflinePass compatibility)
Phase gating (fwd/bwd) and recompute multiplier applied in training mode
_calculate_grad_flops moved to FlopsPass as static method
All existing tests pass after the merge

stories.title: Issue C: Delete dead module memory_train.py
acceptanceCriteria: No import or reference to memory_train or TrainMemoryPass exists in the codebase
All existing tests pass after the deletion

stories.title: Full regression gate: all training tests pass
acceptanceCriteria: PYTHONPATH=python pytest tests/training/ -q shows 0 new failures (218 passed)
PYTHONPATH=python pytest tests/test_transform.py tests/test_executor.py -q shows 0 new failures
